description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden armoire with a classic, paneled design and a painted light gray finish. The front features two large doors with recessed panels and keyholes, flanked by subtle molding details, and a single wide drawer at the base with two small knobs. The top of the cabinet has a slightly overhanging cornice, adding a touch of traditional elegance. The sides are plain and flat, bordered by simple trim, while the back is unadorned. The legs are slender and tapered, giving the piece a refined, elevated stance. This cabinet is suitable for storing clothing, linens, or household items and would be commonly found in residential or urban indoor settings.
description: A tall, light gray wooden armoire with paneled double doors, a base drawer, and slender tapered legs, featuring classic molding details.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with keyholes, a wide base drawer with knobs, and decorative molding.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat side panel with simple trim and the overhanging top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned back panel and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain side panel and visible leg structure.
